name: IdsEdwMbrDLoad

text.value: WITH cte_input AS ( SELECT MBR_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLS_SK, GRP_SK, SUBGRP_SK, SUB_ALPHA_PFX_SK, SUB_MBR_SK, SUB_SK, CLS_DESC, CLS_ID, GRP_ID, GRP_NM, MBR_BRTH_DT_SK, MBR_CASEHEAD_ID, MBR_DCSD_DT_SK, MBR_DCSD_IN, MBR_DSBLTY_COV_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_DSBLTY_COV_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_DSBLTY_IN, MBR_ETHNIC_CD, MBR_ETHNIC_NM, MBR_FEP_LOCAL_CNTR_IN, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_FIRST_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_FIRST_NM END AS MBR_FIRST_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MIDINIT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MIDINIT END AS MBR_MIDINIT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_LAST_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_LAST_NM END AS MBR_LAST_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_FULL_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_FULL_NM END AS MBR_FULL_NM, MBR_GNDR_CD, MBR_GNDR_NM, MBR_ID, MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, MBR_LANG_CD, MBR_LANG_NM, MBR_MCAID_NO, MBR_MCARE_NO, MBR_MO_ST_MCAID_CNTY_CD, MBR_MO_ST_MCAID_CNTY_NM, MBR_OPTRN_VRSN_INDV_BE_KEY_TX, MBR_PREX_COND_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_PREX_COND_MO_QTY, MBR_RELSHP_CD, MBR_RELSHP_NM, MBR_SCRD_IN, MBR_SSN, MBR_STDNT_COV_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_STDNT_COV_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_STDNT_IN, MBR_SFX_NO, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_UNIQ_KEY_ORIG_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_1) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_1 END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_1, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_2) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_2 END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_2, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_3) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_3 END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_LN_3, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM, MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_NM END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_HOME_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_HOME_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX END AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CONF_COMM_IN, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1 END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2 END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3 END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_NM END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CNTY_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CNTY_NM END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CNTY_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_PHN_NO) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_PHN_NO END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_PHN_NO, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_PHN_NO_EXT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_FAX_NO_EXT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(MBR_MAIL_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX) = '' THEN NULL ELSE MBR_MAIL_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX END AS MBR_MAIL_ADDR_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, MBR_VAL_BASED_INCNTV_PGM_IN, SUBGRP_ID, SUBGRP_NM, SUB_ALPHA_PFX_CD, SUB_CNTGS_CNTY_CD, SUB_CNTR_ST_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SUB_FIRST_NM) = '' THEN NULL ELSE SUB_FIRST_NM END AS SUB_FIRST_NM, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SUB_MIDINIT) = '' THEN NULL ELSE SUB_MIDINIT END AS SUB_MIDINIT, CASE WHEN MBR_LANG_CD_SK, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, MBR_MO_ST_MCAID_CNTY_CD_SK, MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, MBR_WORK_PHN_NO, MBR_WORK_PHN_NO_EXT, MBR_CELL_PHN_NO, HOST_MBR_IN, SPIRA_BNF_ID, MBR_HOME_ADDR_LAT_TX,
